news_bbc.title: Why electric cars cost more to insure - and what's being done about it
news_bbc.summary: The insurance cost of electric vehicles is still putting off many would-be buyers. So what can be done about it?

news_bbc.title: I run the UK's biggest bank, here are five ways to manage your money
news_bbc.summary: The CEO of Lloyds Bank talks about how to save, budget, avoid scams and manage money in a relationship.

news_bbc.title: Jackdaw boss warns of winter fuel shortages if gas field not approved
news_bbc.summary: Adura says the UK government must approve North Sea production urgently to avoid domestic supply shortages.

news_bbc.title: Life of Sizewell B extended by another 20 years
news_bbc.summary: The power plant was due to reach the end of its life in 2035 but will now continue until 2055.

news_bbc.title: Virgin Media fined after hanging up on customers trying to cancel contracts
news_bbc.summary: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

news_bbc.title: Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring
news_bbc.summary: The median cost of a home in the city is now $1.7m, a record high, according to the latest figures.

news_bbc.title: From mouthwash to hair dye: How weight-loss jabs are changing shopping habits
news_bbc.summary: The BBC looks at how spending habits have shifted as users report feeling less hungry.

news_bbc.title: Online marketplaces still selling dozens of unsafe baby products, Which? finds
news_bbc.summary: Pillows, sleeping bags and feeders subject to safety notices were found on sites including Amazon and TikTok.
